title: Lockup
description:
Lockup really breaks the symmetry mold. One team seemingly has an advantage, by spawning on the roof on the police station. The Call of Duty blog has intel:

“An international crime syndicate has launched a full onslaught upon a Los Angeles police station, intent on destroying evidence and silencing witnesses.

Operation Grand Heist brings Call of Duty: Black Ops 4 players to this crime scene in progress, complete with fleeing criminals and cops giving chase at the start of the match.” – more
